title: rudgea minor subsp. minor
intro: Rudgea minor subsp. minor, also known as the "Minor Rudgea", is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical regions. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rudgea minor subsp. minor include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
